spells.name: Burrow
spells.effect_description: Unit goes invisible and immobile; Lurker can still attack while burrowed

spells.name: Unburrow
spells.effect_description: Burrowed unit resurfaces and becomes visible and mobile again

spells.name: Parasite
spells.effect_description: Target reveals vision to caster permanently

spells.name: SpawnBroodling
spells.effect_description: Instant kill ground unit, spawn 2 Broodlings

spells.name: Ensnare
spells.effect_description: AOE slow, reveals cloaked units in area

spells.name: Consume
spells.effect_description: Kill friendly unit, +50 MP to caster

spells.name: DarkSwarm
spells.effect_description: AOE field blocks ranged attacks; melee still works

spells.name: Plague
spells.effect_description: AOE 25 damage/sec, won't kill (leaves at 1 HP)

spells.name: Stimpack
spells.effect_description: Doubles attack and move speed temporarily (Marine, Firebat)

spells.name: Cloak
spells.effect_description: Wraith becomes invisible

spells.name: PersonalCloak
spells.effect_description: Ghost becomes invisible

spells.name: Lockdown
spells.effect_description: Freeze mechanical unit

spells.name: NuclearStrike
spells.effect_description: Nuclear missile launched from Silo, massive AOE damage

spells.name: EMPShockwave
spells.effect_description: Remove shields and MP in AOE

spells.name: Irradiate
spells.effect_description: 250 damage over time to biological target and nearby units

spells.name: DefensiveMatrix
spells.effect_description: 250 HP temporary shield

spells.name: ScannerSweep
spells.effect_description: Reveal area, detect cloaked units

spells.name: YamatoGun
spells.effect_description: 260 single-target damage

spells.name: Repair
spells.effect_description: Costs minerals to repair mechanical units and buildings

spells.name: Heal
spells.effect_description: 1 MP per HP healed on friendly biological units

spells.name: Restoration
spells.effect_description: Remove debuffs from unit

spells.name: OpticalFlare
spells.effect_description: Permanently reduce sight to 1

spells.name: PsiStorm
spells.effect_description: 112 AOE damage over 4 seconds

spells.name: Hallucination
spells.effect_description: Create 2 fake copies of a unit

spells.name: Meld
spells.effect_description: 2 Templar merge into Archon

spells.name: DarkMeld
spells.effect_description: 2 Dark Templar merge into Dark Archon

spells.name: Feedback
spells.effect_description: Drain all MP from target as damage

spells.name: Maelstrom
spells.effect_description: Stun biological units in area

spells.name: MindControl
spells.effect_description: Permanently take control of enemy unit

spells.name: Recall
spells.effect_description: Teleport units to Arbiter location

spells.name: StasisField
spells.effect_description: Freeze units in invulnerable stasis

spells.name: DisruptionWeb
spells.effect_description: Ground attacks disabled in area

spells.name: BuildInterceptor
spells.effect_description: Produce interceptor sub-units for Carrier
